date_notes: Mediation resumed October 14 2025 per ATA source (ev_037). Talks broke down without resolution; Bill 2 announced October 23.
title_en: Negotiations resume with mediator during strike — talks fail
title_fr: Les négociations reprennent avec un médiateur pendant la grève — les pourparlers échouent
description_en: Negotiations between the ATA and TEBA resume with a mediator on October 14 2025, eight days into the combined strike and lockout. The mediated talks fail to produce a settlement. On October 23 — nine days after mediation resumed — Premier Smith announces that the government will fast-track back-to-work legislation and invoke the notwithstanding clause. The failure of mediation is the proximate trigger for the legislative response.

relations.note: Failed mediation directly precedes government legislative response.
